lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Private [player name], atten-SHUN! You've been recommended for my corps. Do you think you can be the best?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sir, yes sir!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm not interested.

sections.title: At the Drill Demon training area

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Move yourself, Private! Follow my orders and you may, just may, leave here in a fit state for my corps!

sections.title: Trying to use an exercise mat before an instruction

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: I haven't given you the order yet, worm!

sections.title: After performing the correct exercise or starting the random event

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: I want to see you on that mat doing star jumps, private!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Pathetic. Get out of here then.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Drop and give me push ups on that mat, private!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Get yourself over there and jog on that mat, private!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Get on that mat and give me sit ups, private!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Well I'll be, you actually did it, Private. Now take this and get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Wrong exercise, worm! Drop and give me push ups on that mat, private!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to leave.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Pathetic. Get out of here then.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Wrong exercise, worm! I want to see you on that mat doing star jumps, private!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Wrong exercise, worm! Get on that mat and give me sit ups, private!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Wrong exercise, worm! Get yourself over there and jog on that mat, private!

sections.title: If the player completed the event or is in a zone where the random event isn't allowed

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: As you were, soldier.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Private [player name], atten-SHUN!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Private [player name], atten-SHUN!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Stop day-dreaming, Private [player name]!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Get your rear in gear, Private [player name]!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: I want you for my corps, Private [player name]!

lines.speaker: Sergeant Damien
lines.text: Maybe later.
